name: Neck and Trap Hypertrophy
description: Jeff Nippard's Neck and Trap Hypertrophy Guide - 8 weeks, 2 blocks, 3 days per week focusing on strength, hypertrophy, and metabolic stress
source_file: Jeff Nippard_s Neck and Trap Guide.pdf

exercises.name: Rack Pulls
exercises.notes: Set up barbell at just below knee height, use straps and a belt as needed

exercises.name: Overhead Shrug
exercises.notes: Palms face one another, slight bend in elbows, shrug up and slightly back

exercises.name: Plate Loaded Forward Neck Curl
exercises.notes: Place shoulders on edge of bench, plate on forehead, curl with careful controlled cadence

exercises.name: Harness Loaded Neck Extension
exercises.notes: Sit on edge of bench, lean slightly forward and perform controlled extensions

exercises.name: Upright Row
exercises.notes: Use a 2x shoulder width grip and prevent elbows from exceeding shoulder height

exercises.name: Monkey Shrug
exercises.notes: Slide dumbbells up your sides to about waist height so your elbows are bent and perform shrugs

exercises.name: Plate Loaded Forward Neck Curl
exercises.notes: Slightly lighter weight than Day 1, smooth and controlled reps using neck only

exercises.name: Plate Loaded Neck Extension
exercises.notes: Lie face down on bench with shoulders at edge, load plate on back of head and perform extensions

exercises.name: Wide Grip Barbell Shrug
exercises.notes: Grip barbell at 1.5x shoulder width and lean slightly forward, shrug straight up and squeeze each rep

exercises.name: Rope Lying Shrug
exercises.notes: Place rope overhead, get as close to cable upright as possible and shrug down and back

exercises.name: Plate Loaded Forward Neck Curl
exercises.notes: Slightly lighter weight than Day 2, smooth and controlled reps using neck only

exercises.name: Plate Loaded Neck Extension
exercises.notes: Slightly lighter weight than Day 2, smooth and controlled reps using neck only

phases.name: Block 2
phases.description: Weeks 5-8, lateral neck curls replace monkey shrugs, rope facepull replaces rope lying shrug
